heading: Payments to States; adjustments; advances or reimbursement; installments; conditions
label: 1394 Payments to States; adjustments; advances or reimbursement; installments; conditions
text: Payment of grants under this subchapter may be made (after necessary adjustment on account of previously made underpayments or overpayments) in advance or by way of reimbursement, and in such installments and on such conditions, as the Secretary may determine.
